title: Yinyoo CCZ Melody 10mm Dual Magnetic Circuit In-Ear IEM Headphone, Earfins Design HiFi Deep Bass Earphone with 2PIN Detachable Cable for Audiophile(Green, with Mic)
features: 【Well Selected 1DD+1BA Unit Collocation】CCZ Melody In-Ear-Monitors uses Well-selected BA as the medium and high frequency sounding unit, bringing a delicate dynamic and transient texture.Double magnetic flux has a higher electroacoustic conversion rate than ordinary DD units at the same range. Low impedance and high sensitivity boast a better energy efficiency and transient response. Coupled with electronic frequency division technology, the two units complement each other and work in synergy.

【Professional Tuning for Various Genres】CCZ Melody In-Ear Earphone uses the hybrid unit to make Three frequencies are smoothly connected. Thickness of lows, density of mids and details of highs, and which possess a transparent and natural sound in overall, elastic lows, sufficient quantity, mellow vocals, rich which lead to a versatility for different genres which is suitable for bass, vocals, pop, folk, ACG, and other styles.

【Exclusive Design of Eartips and Patented Earfins】 The eartips of iem adopt TPE material,which is comfortable and smooth to wear. The short sound guide tubes make drivers closer to eardrums to reduce sound loss. The eartip nozzle design brings a more stereo sound in ears, enhancing details and soundstage.Combined with big data of auricle and ear canal, a TPE soft and environment-friendly fin is added to the rear of cavity, providing a more comfortable, stable and lighter experience.

【4 Core 4N OFC Cable】CCZ Melody adopts 4 core 4N OFC iem cable with 0.78MM 2PIN design, giving a boost to transparency, separation, sound field, sound background, vocal and instruments.The earphone adopts lightweight components. A single earphone weighs only 2.3g, light to wear, releasing the burden of ears.At the same time, the detachable cable allows you more optional.

【What will you get?】We provide a one-year warranty service for our products, which means that within one year of your purchase if the product has any non-artificial problems, we will take necessary measures to protect the rights and interests of your consumers. This service does not include force majeure Problems caused by factors.
